creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Ok, sorry for assuming that the ports makefile was the culprit. My bad. I see the problem now... that's a bit of a dilemma to mirror that behaviour somewhat in the port's config selection.

Good to know that bitlbee's configure script apparently still let's you force-enable other backends when passing those flags explicitly, as I did, even with that logic to disable others when purple is selected... but yeah, I'm with you, it's not the makefile's job to change their configure logic.

No worries about doing the opposite of what I was asking for, I agree with what you plan to commit, now that I see the bigger picture here. I like your suggestion, it'll make it more obvious to people what's going on.

Thanks
